creator: oliver.fromme@secnetix.de
text:
Hello Ralf,

Thank you very much for your input.  It's useful to know that
disabling CURL seems to work around the issue.

The build log that you mentioned is based on an outdated version
of mkvtoolnix.  Here's a more recent one based on 6.7.0:

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-pkg-fallout/Week-of-Mon-20140414/145612.html

However, the current upstream version is 6.8.0.  But I guess the
problem is the same.  Unfortunately I'm still at FreeBSD 9 so I
can't provide further analysis.

Best regards
   Oliver
